info.title: Eximpe Payment Gateway API
info.description: API for payment processing and order management through Eximpe payment gateway. This specification is for v3 API version.

post.description: Create a new refund for a previously successful payment.

get.description: Retrieve a list of refunds with optional filtering.

parameters.name: payment_id
parameters.description: Filter by payment ID.

parameters.name: reference_id
parameters.description: Filter by order reference ID.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Filter refunds created from this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Filter refunds created up to this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: merchant_id
parameters.description: Filter refunds by merchant ID.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific refund by its ID.

parameters.name: refund_id
parameters.description: The ID of the refund to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve a list of settlements with optional filtering.

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Filter settlements from this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Filter settlements up to this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

get.description: Retrieve the details of a specific settlement by its ID.

parameters.name: settlement_id
parameters.description: The ID of the settlement to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve a list of merchants with pagination.

parameters.name: merchant_id

post.description: Create a Virtual Bank Account for the authenticated merchant. VBA details (email, name, phone, virtual_account_id) are derived from the merchant account. From v2.0.0 onwards, a merchant can have multiple ACTIVE VBAs simultaneously. The request body is optional — both `remitter_lock_details` and `amount_lock_details` are independently optional and can be omitted, sent individually, or sent together. When omitted, the corresponding field is returned as `null` and the VBA accepts transfers from any remitter / for any amount.

remitter_lock_details.description: Optional. Omit to allow transfers from any remitter. When supplied, restricts the VBA to accept transfers only from the listed remitter accounts. Persisted on the VBA and echoed back on every read.

amount_lock_details.description: Optional. Omit to allow transfers of any amount. When supplied, restricts the VBA to accept transfers within the given range.

remitter_lock_details.description: The remitter lock applied at creation time, persisted from the gateway response. `null` when no lock was supplied.

amount_lock_details.description: The amount lock applied at creation time. `null` when no lock was supplied.

400.description: Validation error — invalid lock details, merchant account not identified, email required, or notification group error

403.description: VBA feature not enabled for merchant

500.description: Failed to generate unique virtual_account_id or configuration error

get.description: Fetch details of an existing Virtual Bank Account by virtual_account_id for the authenticated merchant and syncs the local VBA record.

parameters.name: virtual_account_id
parameters.description: VBA identifier.

remitter_lock_details.description: Remitter lock persisted at creation. `null` when no lock was applied.

amount_lock_details.description: Amount lock persisted at creation. `null` when no lock was applied.

400.description: Business/validation exception from service or missing virtual_account_id in path

404.description: VBA not found for this merchant

500.description: Failed to fetch VBA details or configuration error

get.description: Get a paginated list of payments collected on a Virtual Bank Account for the authenticated merchant, sorted by `created_at` descending. Supports incremental sync via time-window filters (`created_at_*` / `updated_at_*`) and a cursor (`since_id` — payment_id of the last record already synced).

parameters.name: virtual_account_id
parameters.description: Virtual account ID of the VBA.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Default is 250, maximum is 1000.

parameters.name: created_at_start
parameters.description: Include payments with `created_at >= value`. ISO 8601 datetime, e.g. `2026-05-12T00:00:00Z`.

parameters.name: created_at_end
parameters.description: Include payments with `created_at <= value`. ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: updated_at_start
parameters.description: Include payments with `last_updated_at >= value`. ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: updated_at_end
parameters.description: Include payments with `last_updated_at <= value`. ISO 8601 datetime.

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Cursor: `payment_id` of the last record already synced. Only payments created strictly after that one are returned. If `since_id` doesn't match a payment under this VBA, the API returns `400`.

payment_id.description: EximPe payment identifier (UID). Stable, use as primary key.

order_id.description: EximPe order UID this payment belongs to.

status.description: Effective payment status. `PENDING` — created, awaiting completion. `CAPTURED` — money received. `FAILED` — failed or expired past `expiry_date`. `INVALID` — marked invalid by the gateway.

amount.description: Order amount in major units (INR). May be `null` if the order is missing.

payment_utr.description: Bank UTR / transaction reference. Empty string if not yet known.

buyer_account_number.description: Remitter (buyer) bank account number captured from the Cashfree VBA success webhook. `null` when not provided by the bank.

buyer_ifsc.description: Remitter (buyer) bank IFSC code captured from the same webhook. `null` when not provided.

400.description: Validation error. Examples: `created_at_start` / `created_at_end` / `updated_at_start` / `updated_at_end` not a valid ISO 8601 datetime, `since_id` does not match any payment for this VBA, invalid pagination, or `virtual_account_id` missing in path.

404.description: VBA not found for this merchant

get.description: Fetch a single payment for a VBA by UTR.

parameters.name: virtual_account_id
parameters.description: Virtual account ID of the VBA.

parameters.name: utr
parameters.description: UTR of the payment.

payment_id.description: EximPe payment identifier (UID). Stable, use as primary key.

order_id.description: EximPe order UID this payment belongs to.

status.description: Effective payment status. `PENDING` — created, awaiting completion. `CAPTURED` — money received. `FAILED` — failed or expired past `expiry_date`. `INVALID` — marked invalid by the gateway.

amount.description: Order amount in major units (INR). May be `null` if the order is missing.

payment_utr.description: Bank UTR / transaction reference. Empty string if not yet known.

buyer_account_number.description: Remitter (buyer) bank account number captured from the Cashfree VBA success webhook. `null` when not provided by the bank.

buyer_ifsc.description: Remitter (buyer) bank IFSC code captured from the same webhook. `null` when not provided.

404.description: VBA not found for this merchant or payment not found for given UTR and VBA

post.description:
Simulate a payment landing in a Virtual Bank Account so you can test the collection flow end-to-end without a real bank transfer.

**Sandbox only** — this endpoint returns `403` in production. The `utr` must be unique across simulations. `vba_ifsc` is not accepted from the client; it is derived from the target VBA.

virtual_account_id.description: Virtual account ID of the VBA to simulate a transfer into.

amount.description: Amount to credit to the VBA.

utr.description: Unique UTR (Unique Transaction Reference) for the simulated transfer. Must be unique across simulations.

remitter_account.description: Bank account number of the remitter.

remitter_ifsc.description: IFSC code of the remitter's bank.

400.description: Invalid request — missing required fields or duplicate UTR.

403.description: VBA simulation is only available in non-production environments, or the VBA feature is not enabled.

404.description: Virtual bank account not found for this merchant.

authorization_reference_number.description: Conditional parameter required for specific card networks: For Rupay cards - the authorization reference number received during authorization call. For AMEX cards - the AEVV (American Express Verification Value) received during authorization call. This parameter is mandatory for Rupay and AMEX cards only.

Values: E-commerce (physical goods & cross-border shipping), Digital goods / software / downloads, SaaS / subscriptions / recurring billing, Services (delivered cross-border), Marketplace / platform (multiple sellers), Other

Invoice display number for the recurring payment

clientAuth.name: X-Client-ID
clientAuth.description: **Client Application ID** - Your unique application identifier used to authenticate API requests. You can find your Client ID in the Developer Settings section of the merchant dashboard.

clientSecretAuth.name: X-Client-Secret
clientSecretAuth.description: **Client Secret Key** - Your secret key used alongside the Client ID for secure authentication. Keep this confidential and never expose it in client-side code. Available in the Developer Settings section of the merchant dashboard.

merchantAuth.name: X-Merchant-ID
merchantAuth.description: **Merchant Identifier** - The unique ID for the merchant account. This is required for PSP (Payment Service Provider) merchants who manage multiple merchant accounts. You can find merchant IDs in the Merchant Management section of the dashboard.

apiVersionHeader.name: X-API-Version
apiVersionHeader.description: **API Version** - Specifies which version of the API to use (e.g., '1.X.X', '2.X.X', or '3.X.X'). This header allows you to control which API version your integration uses. Default version information is available in the Developer Settings.
